meta.title: aiAdaptiv — Your Private Company Brain. Owned, Not Rented.
meta.description: A fully white-labeled, document-intelligence AI platform deployed inside your own secure EU cloud account (Koyeb). You own the infrastructure, keys, and data. GDPR & EU AI Act safe. Strictly 6 founding partners.

hero.badge: 🔒 Strictly 6 Founding Design Partners This Quarter
hero.subhead: We deploy a fully white-labeled AI platform directly inside your own secure EU cloud account (Koyeb). You own the infrastructure, keys, and data. We do the heavy lifting.
hero.tagline: No more pasting sensitive client data into public tools.

problem.h2: Public AI is a Massive Liability
points: Regulatory fines up to 4% (GDPR) or 7% (EU AI Act).
Your contracts and client data can train public models.
Small teams can't keep up with infrastructure and updates.

solution.h2: We Deploy It. You Own It.

pillars.title: Secure Document Intelligence
pillars.body: Upload 200-page contracts or due-diligence files. Safely extract risks, compare versions, and get summaries — with zero data leaks.

pillars.title: 100% White-Labeled
pillars.body: ai.yourfirm.com with your branding. A real internal asset.

pillars.title: Your Own Cloud Account
pillars.body: Deployed in your own Koyeb account. You control everything.

pillars.title: Zero Overhead
pillars.body: We handle model updates, security, and maintenance.

pricing.note: We are flexible with serious design partners — if your team has specific open-source model preferences or specialized workflow needs, we will tailor the deployment during setup.

howItWorks.intro: We make private AI simple by deploying everything inside your own cloud account.

steps.title: 1. You Create Your Account
steps.body: You sign up for a Koyeb account (EU region — Paris or Frankfurt). You control billing and own the infrastructure.

steps.title: 2. We Build & Brand It
steps.body: We log in (with your permission), deploy Open WebUI + optimized open-source models, apply your logo and branding, and map your custom domain (ai.yourfirm.com).

steps.title: 3. You Get Full Access
steps.body: Your team logs in with their accounts. All processing happens inside your secure environment.

steps.title: 4. We Handle Maintenance
steps.body: We take care of model updates, security patches, and performance tuning every month.

howItWorks.flow:
Your Koyeb Account (EU)
        ↓
We Deploy Open WebUI + Models
        ↓
White-Labeled at ai.yourfirm.com
        ↓
Your Team Uses It Securely
   (We Maintain Monthly)
howItWorks.outro: You own the account. You own the data. We do the technical work.

qualifier.yes: you work with sensitive legal, financial, or client documents daily.
qualifier.no: you just need a cheap general AI tool.

footer.disclaimer: aiAdaptiv provides configuration and maintenance services inside the Client's own cloud environment. The Client owns the account and is solely responsible for data inputs and regulatory compliance. Service provided "as-is". Liability limited to fees paid.
